interpretation: Analyzed 8 development segments. No significant correlation (p=0.260). Quality proxy combines fix density (45%), test density (30%), documentation (25%). GI balance excluded from quality to avoid circularity.
caveats: Quality proxies are commit-derived, not ground-truth quality assessments
Composite score weights are heuristic, not empirically calibrated
Sprint date ranges may overlap slightly
Layer 3 ensemble classifier used (keyword + diff-stat + file-type)
